field_values.action_summary: Amidst the duel, chaos erupts as Dejah Thoris confronts Sarkoja. Sola attempts to protect the princess and is stabbed by Sarkoja. In the ensuing distraction, Zad delivers a fatal thrust to Carter's chest, leaving him dying on the ground.
field_values.camera_intent: Handheld/unstable shots for melee chaos; Close-ups on Sola's injury and Carter's wound; Wide shot of the aftermath
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Blood splatter and wound locations on Sola and Carter
Character positions during the melee transition
Lighting shifts if sun position changes significantly
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH014_SC005

## Production Intent
Execute a high-intensity melee transition into sudden, localized violence resulting in two major character injuries. The sequence must shift from kinetic chaos to static tragedy through rapid changes in camera stability and subject movement.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- sola
- sarkoja
- zad

## Required Environments
- duel_arena_open_plains

## Continuity Constraints
- Blood splatter/wound locations on Sola and Carter
- Character positions during the melee transition
- Lighting shifts if sun position changes significantly

## Beat List
- BT001: Melee chaos and confrontation (Dejah vs Sarkoja)
- BT002: Sola's injury (Sarkoja stabs Sola)
- BT003: Carter's fatal wound and aftermath (Zad strikes Carter; wide aftermath)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
